series_metadata.series_description: File contains records received from the Bureau of Criminal Investigation (BCI), and other sources, for the corporations and individuals receiving a video lottery license, individual applicants for traditional lottery licenses, lottery employees and vendors.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: If paper copy exists in operating area, three (3) years, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain copy digitally in Ohio Lottery database and in hard copy (if exists) in a secure area with access limited to persons who need these records to carry out their duties and responsibilities, for five (5) years, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
